theme: Clean _field_types coverage in _TEMPLATE + skip meta paths in finalizer
summary: First wellness/cosmetic pilot stress test of finalize-mutation-batch surfaced 17 warnings, most were latent _TEMPLATE bugs, not agent fabrication. Two-pronged fix: (1) make the wrapper skip pointers starting with $ (JSON-Schema metadata) and _ (runtime metadata like _snapshot, _proposed, _source), and skip non-entity files (config.json, status.json, learnings-index.json, session-state.md, pending-validations.md). These are workspace state, not data canon. (2) Patch _TEMPLATE _field_types maps across brand.json, products/_example/spec.json, products/_example/offers.json (full map created from scratch), audiences/_example/profile.json, learnings.json. Re-run on the same wellness/cosmetic pilot data after the patch: 0 warnings, 0 blocking, ok=true.

changes.reason: Skip $-prefixed and _-prefixed pointers. Skip non-entity workspace-state files.
Add meta.* and audiences_index globs to _field_types.
_field_types map created from scratch — was empty. Covers offer_groups, shared.*, offers[].*, pricing fields with proper observed/derived split.

operator_impact: None visible. Existing brands keep working. New brands scaffolded from _TEMPLATE now pass finalize-mutation-batch on first run with 0 warnings.
tested_on: a wellness/cosmetic pilot workspace re-run post-patch: 17 warnings → 0 warnings, 0 blocking, ok=true on the same input data.
caught_by: v2.7.2 wrapper output on first a wellness/cosmetic pilot stress run.
